title: dolichandrone alternifolia subsp. alternifolia
intro: Dolichandrone alternifolia subsp. alternifolia, also known as the Yellow Bells or Golden Trumpet, is a plant species belonging to the family Bignoniaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Dolichandrone alternifolia subsp. alternifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antiviral properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
